description:
Your company is launching its summer clothing line. Set up the full product, promotion, and fulfillment pipeline.

Create a configurable product 'Linen Resort Shirt' (SKU: SHIRT-LINEN-001, $79.99, Clothing category) with a new dropdown attribute 'shirt_size' (attribute code: shirt_size, label: Shirt Size) having options S, M, L, XL — generate 4 simple product variants (one per size), each with 50 units in stock. Create a cart price rule 'Summer Checkout Bonus' with coupon code SUMMER25 giving a flat $25 off orders with subtotal $200 or more, limited to 1 use per customer and 500 total uses. Verify the pipeline by placing an admin phone order for john.doe@example.com with 3x Linen Resort Shirt (size M) and 1x Jacket (JACKET-001), shipped to John Doe at 100 Commerce Drive, Austin, TX 78701 (phone: 555-0100), using Check/Money Order payment with coupon SUMMER25 applied. Invoice the full order and create a shipment with tracking number UPS1Z2025SUMMER0001 (carrier: Custom Value).

If login is required, use admin/Admin1234!.
